message:
feat(emulators): Add NPM command emulator

Implement npm_emulator.zig for sandboxed npm command mocking.

Supported commands:
- --version/-v: Version info
- list/ls: Package tree
- run [script]: Script execution (build, start, lint, test)
- test/t: Jest-style test output
- install/i: Package installation
- info/view: Package info
- outdated: Outdated packages
- audit: Security audit
- config list/get: NPM config
- whoami: Current user

Security:
- Blocks npm publish (no real publishing)
- Blocks npm login/adduser (no real auth)
- Blocks npm init (requires interactive input)
- Blocks npm config set (no persistence)

Includes 15 unit tests for npm emulator functionality.
